mapper.insert: insert into risk_reminder (user_id, alert_id, title, content, read_status, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{alertId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{readStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select * from risk_reminder where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc, id desc
select * from risk_reminder order by create_time desc, id desc
mapper.update: update risk_reminder set read_status = #{readStatus}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update risk_reminder set read_status = #{readStatus}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
